semantic.role: Defines architectural rules and constraints for the ArchSpine demo project, serving as a machine-readable governance specification.
responsibilities: Documenting layer isolation rules between API, domain, and infrastructure modules
Specifying documentation requirements for domain-level public interfaces
Providing parser-compatible rule syntax for automated enforcement
outOfScope: Detailed implementation guidelines for specific programming languages or frameworks
User-facing feature specifications or product requirements

English.purpose: This document establishes the core architectural governance rules for the ArchSpine demo project. It defines clear boundaries between software layers and mandates documentation standards to maintain code quality and architectural integrity.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for developers and architects working on the ArchSpine project who need to understand and comply with the enforced architectural constraints. The rules are written in a parser-compatible format to enable automated validation.
key_takeaways: API handlers must not directly import infrastructure modules, ensuring layer independence
All public domain classes and methods require TSDoc comments for maintainable architecture documentation
Rules are structured for both human readability and machine parsing

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档为ArchSpine演示项目定义了核心架构治理规则。它明确了软件层之间的边界，并强制要求文档标准，以维护代码质量和架构完整性。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向ArchSpine项目的开发者和架构师，帮助他们理解并遵守强制性的架构约束。规则采用解析器兼容格式编写，支持自动化验证。
key_takeaways: API处理器不得直接导入基础设施模块，确保层间独立性
所有公共领域类和方法必须包含TSDoc注释，以维护可读的架构文档
规则结构兼顾人类可读性与机器解析能力
